title: bupleurum baldense var. oeneum
intro: Bupleurum baldense var. oeneum, also known as Chinese kuko, is a variant of the Bupleurum baldense plant, a flowering plant species in the family Apiaceae. The medicinal properties of Bupleurum baldense var. oeneum include its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, as well as its traditional use in treating digestive problems and anxiety. Bupleurum baldense var. oeneum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in dried or powdered form, to be used in traditional medicine and herbal supplements.
